channel.title: Copilot Studio on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Copilot Studio on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: dotnet: Copilot Studio gets faster with .NET 10 on WebAssembly
item.description:
Microsoft Copilot Studio upgraded its WebAssembly engine to .NET 10. The migration was described as straightforward, simplified deployment, and improved performance for end users.

  • Source: .NET

item.title: security: Addressing the OWASP Top 10 Risks in Agentic AI with Microsoft Copilot Studio
item.description:
Microsoft published a security blog post mapping OWASP’s Top 10 risks for agentic applications to mitigations in Microsoft Copilot Studio. The article frames agentic AI as introducing new security risks and presents Copilot Studio as a way to address them.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog
